params_used.custom_text: // This module compares two 4-bit inputs, A and B, and produces three output signals: greater, less, and equal. On each rising edge of the clock, if the reset signal is asserted, all output signals are set to HIGH. When the reset is not active, the module evaluates the inputs A and B, setting greater to LOW if A is greater than B, less to LOW if A is less than B, and equal to LOW if both inputs are equal, ensuring only one of the output flags is LOW at any time.
